title: test api health endpoint
description: Verify that the /api/auth/test endpoint returns a success message confirming the authentication API is reachable and operational.

title: test user login with valid credentials
description: Test the /api/auth/login endpoint with valid username and password to ensure it returns a valid JWT token and correct user details.

title: test user login with invalid credentials
description: Test the /api/auth/login endpoint with invalid username or password to verify it returns a 401 status with an appropriate error message.

title: test user login with deactivated account
description: Test the /api/auth/login endpoint with credentials of a deactivated account to ensure it returns a 403 status with a proper error response.

title: test user registration with unique username and email
description: Test the /api/auth/register endpoint by registering a new user with a unique username and email to verify successful registration and a 201 response.

title: test user registration with duplicate username or email
description: Test the /api/auth/register endpoint by attempting to register a user with an existing username or email to ensure it fails with a 400 status and appropriate error message.

title: test fetch current authenticated user with valid token
description: Test the /api/auth/me endpoint with a valid JWT token to verify it returns the current authenticated user's details correctly.

title: test fetch current authenticated user with invalid or missing token
description: Test the /api/auth/me endpoint without a token or with an invalid token to ensure it returns a 401 unauthorized status with an appropriate error message.
